examples.text: وَإِذَا أَتَتْكَ مَذَمَّتِي مِنْ نَاقِصٍ / فَهِيَ الشَّهَادَةُ لِي بِأَنِّي كَامِلُ
examples.english: If slandered be I by a man so blemished; it is testimony to the fact that I'm so perfect.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of كَمَلَ (kamala, “to be complete, to be finished”) and كَمِلَ (kamila, “to be complete, to be finished”) and كَمُلَ (kamula, “to be complete, to be finished”).
